events.title: Ecstatic Dance in the Dark
events.description: Weekly ecstatic dance in a darkened space at Paradiso Ubud — Wednesdays 6–8pm. Dancing without visual distraction deepens somatic presence; the dark environment removes self-consciousness and focuses awareness inward on movement and sensation. Format is open free-form dance. Strict no-entry after 6:15pm. No phones on the floor. IDR 150k via Megatix. A distinct format from Vibración (Thu) and Moving Waves (Tue) at the same venue.
events.short_description: Darkness-format ecstatic dance at Paradiso — Wednesdays 6–8pm, IDR 150k. No entry after 6:15pm.

events.title: New Moon Cacao Ceremony & Ecstatic Dance
events.description: New Moon in Gemini gathering led by Levi Banner — cacao ceremonialist, ecstatic dance DJ, and certified Shamanic Astrologer who has been offering these ceremonies since 2011. Session begins with a sacred Bali-grown cacao ceremony: participants drink the cacao elixir, open their hearts, and set intentions for the lunar cycle. The ceremony transitions into a free-form ecstatic dance journey. Levi has been based in Bali since 2013 and has collaborated with The Yoga Barn and other Ubud venues. Tickets on Megatix.
events.short_description: New Moon in Gemini: cacao ceremony flowing into ecstatic dance with Levi Banner. Ubud, Saturday 7–9pm.

events.title: AYNI — New Moon Sacred Fire & Cacao Ceremony
events.description: New Moon Sacred Fire & Cacao Ceremony at The Yoga Barn, led by Juan — a practitioner of Andean and Mayan Earth Keeper traditions with 14 years of lineage-based study. AYNI (Quechua: sacred reciprocity) is the ceremony's animating principle — honouring the dance between giving and receiving. The June New Moon portal, approaching the summer solstice, is held as a threshold for new beginnings, gratitude, and community. Ceremony weaves together cacao medicina to open the heart, Andean-inspired offerings, sacred fire, prayer, and medicine music. Starts 3pm. Register at Yoga Barn reception or via Megatix. WhatsApp Yoga Barn hotline for payment queries.
events.short_description: New Moon Sacred Fire & Cacao at Yoga Barn — Andean wisdom lineage, June 14 at 3pm. Led by Juan.

events.title: Solstice Kirtan, Cacao & Fire Ritual with Jeremy Sol
events.description: Summer solstice celebration at Alchemy Yoga & Meditation Center (AYMC) Ubud, led by Jeremy Sol (Bhakti Bliss Bali). The evening weaves kirtan — devotional call-and-response singing — with ceremonial cacao and a sacred fire ritual into a collective ecstatic experience. Jeremy Sol is a bhakti yogi, kirtan facilitator, and longtime curator of devotional community spaces in Ubud; he leads the Full Moon Celebration series at AYMC and has collaborated with Zest Ubud and The Yoga Barn. The Shiva Shala at AYMC, set among Sayan rice fields, provides the ceremonial container. Presale IDR 200,000 / door IDR 250,000. Tickets via Megatix.
events.short_description: Solstice kirtan, cacao & fire ritual at AYMC with Jeremy Sol (@bhaktiblissbali). Jun 21. Presale IDR 200k.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No.2, Peliatan, Ubud, Bali 80571
